author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more foundation Tier-3s (KVM + PCI):

- virt/kvm/kvm-core.md: covers virt/kvm/kvm_main.c — KVM arch-agnostic core: /dev/kvm chardev + per-VM (struct kvm) + per-vcpu (struct kvm_vcpu) lifecycle, vm/vcpu fd ioctl dispatch, KVM_RUN central blocking ioctl, vcpu shared run-page mmap, vCPU thread main loop with signal-pending preempt + immediate_exit handshake, MMU notifier integration (host pte change → SPTE invalidate), per-VM RCU memslot table mgmt, vcpu preempt notifiers for context-switch save/restore, per-VM stats. 10 REQ / 10 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + mmap-lifetime + memslot-overflow + vcpu-idx-OOB) / Layer-2 ref to vcpu_runloop.tla + spte_lifecycle.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus run-loop equivalence.
- drivers/pci/probe.md: covers drivers/pci/probe.c — recursive bus enumeration, BAR sizing per PCI Local Bus Spec § 6.2.5.1, capability scan (std + ext) with cycle-bound, ARI handling for SR-IOV, MFD bit detection, PCIe port-type classification, per-device kobject + sysfs registration, modalias generation, hot-plug rescan integration, multi-domain support. 10 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + cap-walk-termination + BAR-overflow + devfn-OOB) / Layer-2 ref to cap_iteration.tla + bar_assignment.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus scan-equivalence.

Total state: 240 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 6 Tier-3s.

Knowledge pages: design-virt-kvm-kvm-core, design-drivers-pci-probe.

Next iter plan: drivers/nvme/host-core.md (NVMe controller + namespace lifecycle + identify + reset state machine + AEN — busiest single driver) + kernel/locking/qspinlock.md (already-existing strong locking subsystem; could go deep on the qspinlock or other primitive).
